description: Firestore has CRUD functions for contractor applications
steps: Open packages/web/lib/firestore.ts
Verify createApplication function exists and writes to 'applications' collection with serverTimestamp
Verify getContractorApplicationForBuilding function exists for duplicate guard check
Verify getApplicationsForBuilding function exists with optional status filter
Verify getContractorApplications function exists to get all applications by contractor
Verify getCompanyApplications function exists with optional status filter
Verify updateApplicationStatus function exists that updates status, companyNotes, reviewedAt
Verify withdrawApplication function exists that sets status to 'withdrawn'
Verify listBrowsableProjects function exists querying buildings with status 'planning' or 'under_construction'

description: acceptApplicationAndAssign creates contractor assignment and sends notification
steps: Open packages/web/lib/firestore.ts
Verify acceptApplicationAndAssign function exists
Verify it calls updateApplicationStatus with 'accepted'
Verify it calls addContractor to create a building contractor assignment
Verify it calls createNotification with type 'application_accepted'

description: Firestore security rules protect applications collection
steps: Open firestore.rules
Verify applications match block exists at /applications/{applicationId}
Verify read requires authentication and checks contractorUserId or companyMember
Verify create requires 'contractor' role and contractorUserId matches auth uid
Verify update allows company member or contractor can only set status to 'withdrawn'
Verify delete is false

description: Firestore indexes exist for applications queries
steps: Open firestore.indexes.json
Verify index for applications(buildingId, createdAt DESC) exists
Verify index for applications(buildingId, status, createdAt DESC) exists
Verify index for applications(contractorUserId, createdAt DESC) exists
Verify index for applications(contractorUserId, buildingId, status) exists for duplicate guard
Verify index for applications(companyId, createdAt DESC) exists
Verify index for applications(companyId, status, createdAt DESC) exists
Verify index for buildings(status, createdAt DESC) exists for browsable projects
